calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-16-2015 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Oct-26-2015 Continued To Nov-16-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Sep-14-2015 Continued To Oct-26-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ernest Der for (petitioner) Jason Darmadi.

Mr. Der reported that a courtesy copy of his declaration was delivered on Friday, that under P.C. cash accounts can be appraised by the administrator, that there is no restriction on institutions being foreign or domestic, that everything is valued in U.S. dollars and that one of the accounts was in New Zealand dollars but converted to U.S. dollars. The Court stated that it is not sure it is convinced, asked if there was anything additional for it to consider and asked if a continuance to October 26, 2015 would work if it was necessary to have a probate referee appraisal. Mr. Der stated that the cost would be about $8,000.00 to the referee which would be a significant amount to the estate. The Court stated that it will need to review this with the examiner, that the matter will be continued to October 26the if they disagree and if they agree Mr. Der will be given a different time frame. The accounting petition was continued to October 26, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Aug-17-2015 Continued To Sep-14-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ernest Der for (Administrator) Jason Darmadi. Diana Hastings for (trustee) Jason Darmadi.

The Court stated that an appraisal is needed of the non U.S. accounts. Mr. Der reported that the current probate referee would not have jurisdiction to make the appraisals, that they would have to pay a separate referee to do the same thing that counsel can do which is calculating the conversions off of the statements. Ms. Hastings stated that the accounts are denominated in dollars and that the personal representative is allowed to appraise U.S. dollar accounts no matter where the accounts are located. The Court stated that notice is also needed. Mr. Der stated that notice to the father of Julian was given and that under Nevada law he is the sole heir. The Court stated that the examiner believes the accounts should be appraised by a referee. Ms. Hastings stated again that the funds are in U.S. denominations. The accounting petition was continued to September 14, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jul-27-2015 Continued To Aug-17-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION

Off Calendar May-13-2015 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On The Filing Of Another Status Report Or A Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Apr-29-2015 Continued To May-13-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ernest Der for (petitioner) Jason Darmadi.

Mr. Der reported that the petition is drafted and had been sent to his client for review and signature, that his client is in Indonesia for business and is not responding and that he will continue to contact him to get this completed. The status on filing a status report or a petition for final distribution was continued to May 13, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On The Filing Of Another Status Report Or A Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Apr-01-2015 Continued To Apr-29-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ernest Der for (Executor) Jason Darmadi.

Mr. Der reported that the IRS has issued a final determination on the appeals, that they can now petition for final distribution and requested a 3 week continuance to do so. The status of filing a petition for final distribution was continued to April 29, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Sep-16-2014 Off Calendar

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar May-13-2014 Continued To Sep-16-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ernest Der for Jason Darmadi.

Mr. Der stated that they can not close the Estate because the IRS appeal is not resolved, that they are still working on finding an address for Julian's Father, that Counsel in Nevada have not opened a probate for Julian and that all of the funds are now in the United States. Status of administration was continued to September 16, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy D. Jones. (Not Reported)

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Feb-18-2014 Continued To May-13-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ernest Der for Jason Darmadi.

With regard to Julian's estate, Mr. Der stated that the family is still waiting for this estate to be resolved (IRS issue) and then proceed, that the bulk of the trust goes to his Client if Julian does not survive distribution and that a trust was set up for Julian which is to receive from this estate. Mr. Der also stated that the Father is still alive, that he needs to track down the Father's address, that the IRS settled but that they came back with additional interest and penalties, and that it is in the appeal process. Furthermore, Mr. Der stated that Joan is a sister of Elizabeth, that he does not have a date of death for Julian and that Julian passed away last year sometime. Status of administration was continued to May 13, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Feb-04-2014 Continued To Feb-18-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Filing Of Petition For Approval Of Status Report Or A Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Oct-28-2013 Continued To Nov-18-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ernest Der for Jason Darmadi.

Mr. Der stated that he was unable to collect his Client's signature, that there are tax issues, that they are not quite ready to file the petition for final distribution and that it will take more time to sort out the taxes. Status on filing of a petition for final distribution was continued to November 18, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Counsel to file a second petition for approval of status report.

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy W. Clark. (Not Reported)

Off Calendar May-07-2013 Continued To May-14-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:Ernest Der for Jason Darmadi.

Mr. Der reported that the tax reports are complete, that he received a signed status report this morning which he will file for approval, that one of the beneficaries has passed away, and that a probate proceeding needs to be opened. Status on filing petition for final distribution/approval of status report was continued to May 14, 2013.

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Nancy Bautista/Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.

Off Calendar Mar-26-2013 Continued To May-07-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Attorney Ernest Der to appear on May 7, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why a Petition for Final Distribution or a Petition for Approval of Status Report has not been filed. The status hearing was also continued to that date.
